articles.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
articles.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

en.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
en.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

de.title: Helle Lichter und heiße Kugeln: UFO-Akten geben Aufschluss über Sichtungen, überlassen die Interpretation jedoch der Öffentlichkeit
de.summary: Am 8. Mai 2026 veröffentlichte das US-Kriegsministerium seinen ersten Stapel freigegebener UAP-Datensätze und startete damit das öffentliche Archiv PURSUE, das nach Angaben der Trump-Regierung alle paar Wochen aktualisiert wird. Die Veröffentlichung folgt einer Anweisung von Präsident Trump vom 19. Februar 2026, die Bundesbehörden anweist, Dokumente im Zusammenhang mit außerirdischem Leben und UAP zu identifizieren, zu überprüfen und freizugeben. Sie umfasst Dutzende von Behörden und Dutzende Millionen Aufzeichnungen, viele davon nur auf Papier.

articles.title: Newly Released UAP Files Are Shattering Decades Of NASA’s UFO Narrative Just As Artemis Pushes Humanity Back Into Deep Space
articles.summary: NASA has long stated that there is no confirmed evidence of alien spacecraft visiting Earth, a position it has maintained even as new UAP files are released. The Trump administration’s PURSUE program has begun declassifying military, intelligence, and defense archives that contain reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena, radar tracking incidents, astronaut observations, and classified investigations spanning decades. S.

en.summary: NASA has long stated that there is no confirmed evidence of alien spacecraft visiting Earth, a position it has maintained even as new UAP files are released. The Trump administration’s PURSUE program has begun declassifying military, intelligence, and defense archives that contain reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena, radar tracking incidents, astronaut observations, and classified investigations spanning decades. de.title: Neu veröffentlichte UAP-Dateien zerstören jahrzehntelange UFO-Erzählungen der NASA, gerade als Artemis die Menschheit zurück in den Weltraum drängt
de.summary: Die NASA hat seit langem erklärt, dass es keine bestätigten Beweise dafür gibt, dass außerirdische Raumschiffe die Erde besucht haben, eine Position, die sie auch nach der Veröffentlichung neuer UAP-Dateien beibehalten hat. Das PURSUE-Programm der Trump-Regierung hat mit der Freigabe von Militär-, Geheimdienst- und Verteidigungsarchiven begonnen, die Berichte über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene, Radarverfolgungsvorfälle, Astronautenbeobachtungen und geheime Untersuchungen über Jahrzehnte enthalten. S.

articles.title: Illusionist Uri Geller Reacts To US Congressman's Warning Over Next Set Of UFO Files: 'Holy Crap Is Coming'
articles.summary: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reacted to US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf those already released, saying he believes every word of the warning. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first set of 162 documents was only a “drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming” with future releases.

de.title: Der Illusionist Uri Geller reagiert auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten vor der nächsten Reihe von UFO-Dateien: „Heiliger Mist kommt“
de.summary: Der israelisch-britische Illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reagierte auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten Tim Burchett, dass die nächste Ladung freigegebener UFO-Dateien die bereits freigegebenen in den Schatten stellen werde, und sagte, er glaube jedes Wort der Warnung. Burchett, ein Mitglied des UAP Caucus, sagte Joe Rogan, dass der erste Satz von 162 Dokumenten nur ein „Tropfen auf den heißen Stein“ sei und dass mit zukünftigen Veröffentlichungen „heiliger Mist kommt“.

articles.title: A small Oregon town puts on a big UFO festival. Why it's worth a visit
articles.summary: The 26th Annual McMenamins UFO Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, runs from May 14 to May 17, 2026, and is hosted by the McMenamins Hotel Oregon, making it the second largest UFO festival in the United States after Roswell. The festival celebrates the 1950 UFO sighting by Paul and Evelyn Trent, whose photographs of a metallic object sparked national debate and are considered among the most famous UFO images.

en.summary: The 26th Annual McMenamins UFO Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, runs from May 14 to May 17, 2026, and is hosted by the McMenamins Hotel Oregon, making it the second largest UFO festival in the United States after Roswell. de.title: Eine kleine Stadt in Oregon veranstaltet ein großes UFO-Festival. Warum es einen Besuch wert ist
de.summary: Das 26. jährliche McMenamins UFO-Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, findet vom 14. bis 17. Mai 2026 statt und wird vom McMenamins Hotel Oregon ausgerichtet. Damit ist es nach Roswell das zweitgrößte UFO-Festival in den Vereinigten Staaten. Das Festival feiert die UFO-Sichtung von Paul und Evelyn Trent im Jahr 1950, deren Fotografien eines metallischen Objekts eine landesweite Debatte auslösten und zu den berühmtesten UFO-Bildern zählen.

articles.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
articles.summary: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, but a preliminary review shows only blurry photographs, grainy videos, artist reconstructions, and anecdotal reports, with no new evidence of alien visitation. The files contain documents such as an artist’s composite sketch of an alleged ellipsoid bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian Foreign Ministry report claiming a Russian aircraft was a UFO, a 2023 Mexican Congress testimony on UAP that includes debunked fake alien corpses, and heavily redacted documents with a disclaimer protecting eyewitness identities and sensitive locations.

en.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
en.summary: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, but a preliminary review shows only blurry photographs, grainy videos, artist reconstructions, and anecdotal reports, with no new evidence of alien visitation. The files contain documents such as an artist’s composite sketch of an alleged ellipsoid bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian Foreign Ministry report claiming a Russian aircraft was a UFO, a 2023 Mexican Congress testimony on UAP that includes debunked fake alien corpses, and heavily redacted documents with a disclaimer protecting eyewitness identities and sensitive locations.

de.title: UFO-Dateien enthüllen … das gleiche alte Material
de.summary: Präsident Donald Trump und das Kriegsministerium haben die UFO-Akten veröffentlicht, aber eine vorläufige Überprüfung zeigt nur verschwommene Fotos, körnige Videos, Künstlerrekonstruktionen und anekdotische Berichte, ohne neue Beweise für den Besuch von Außerirdischen. Die Akten enthalten Dokumente wie eine von einem Künstler zusammengesetzte Skizze eines angeblich ellipsoiden bronzenen Metallobjekts, einen Bericht des georgischen Außenministeriums aus dem Jahr 2001, in dem behauptet wird, ein russisches Flugzeug sei ein UFO, eine Zeugenaussage des mexikanischen Kongresses zu UAP aus dem Jahr 2023, die entlarvte gefälschte Alienleichen enthält, sowie stark redigierte Dokumente mit einem Haftungsausschluss, der die Identität von Augenzeugen und sensible Orte schützt.

summaries.file-release-bright-lights-and-hot-orbs-: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper. The first tranche focuses on cases where the government cannot definitively determine the nature of the phenomena and contains Apollo 12 and 17 imagery, a cockpit transcript describing bright particles, FBI infrared images of unidentified objects over the western US in 2025, and military reports from incidents in the UAE, Greece, the Middle East, Africa, Japan, and North America. FBI Director Kash Patel said his agency handed over its first batch of classified UAP documents to the Pentagon‑led inter‑agency committee, while Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and DNI Tulsi Gabbard framed the release as evidence of the administration’s commitment to transparency and a joint declassification effort. The Department of War notes that many unresolved cases reflect insufficient data rather than anomalous capability, invites private‑sector analysis, and that the initiative’s success will depend on whether future tranches provide new operational detail rather than additional Apollo‑era curiosities and short infrared clips.
summaries.file-release-how-to-watch-sleeping-dog-o: "Sleeping Dog" is a UFO documentary that follows investigative journalist Jeremy Corbell and includes eight new, unreleased U.S. military sensor videos. The film features interviews with insiders such as astronaut Dr. Edgar Mitchell, Col. John B. Alexander, John Lear, Bob Lazar, David Grusch, nuclear chemist Edmund Storms, Cmdr. David Fravor, and journalist George Knapp. Corbell claims that releasing the film is his only protection against government attempts to silence whistleblowers. The documentary premiered theatrically on May 8 and will be available to buy or rent on Prime Video and Apple TV in the U.S. and Canada from May 12, with a U.K. release on Prime Video. Availability outside these regions requires a VPN, and the film is not yet available on Amazon Prime Video in Australia.
summaries.file-release-newly-released-uap-files-ar: NASA has long stated that there is no confirmed evidence of alien spacecraft visiting Earth, a position it has maintained even as new UAP files are released. The Trump administration’s PURSUE program has begun declassifying military, intelligence, and defense archives that contain reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena, radar tracking incidents, astronaut observations, and classified investigations spanning decades. These documents show that U.S. government agencies have treated the UAP phenomenon as serious enough to warrant classified investigations, intelligence monitoring, aerospace analysis, and national‑security scrutiny for years. The revelations contrast with the public narrative that UFO sightings are usually explained by weather balloons, optical effects, or camera artifacts, and now acknowledge unresolved encounters involving astronauts, military pilots, advanced radar systems, and craft with capabilities that are not easily explained by conventional aerospace engineering. NASA’s official stance remains unchanged, but the new context highlights a discrepancy between the agency’s measured public tone and the seriousness with which some government entities have approached the phenomenon.
summaries.illusionist-uri-geller-reacts-to-us-cong: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reacted to US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf those already released, saying he believes every word of the warning. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first set of 162 documents was only a “drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming” with future releases. He cited reports of pilots being pulled from duty for psychological evaluation after UAP encounters, and alleged sightings of underwater craft moving over 200 mph and as large as a football field. Geller tweeted that in the 1970s he was shown fragments of metal from a crashed UFO by rocket scientist Wernher von Braun, and that he later saw non‑human bodies stored at NASA’s Goddard Space Center. He claims the already released files, which include Apollo and Gemini mission reports of strange lights and objects, validate his long‑standing assertions and hopes the forthcoming documents will expose NASA’s full involvement.
summaries.a-small-oregon-town-puts-on-a-big-ufo-fe: The 26th Annual McMenamins UFO Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, runs from May 14 to May 17, 2026, and is hosted by the McMenamins Hotel Oregon, making it the second largest UFO festival in the United States after Roswell. The festival celebrates the 1950 UFO sighting by Paul and Evelyn Trent, whose photographs of a metallic object sparked national debate and are considered among the most famous UFO images. Organizers describe the event as a gathering where skeptics and believers meet, offering speakers, live entertainment, a parade, costume contests, a trivia session, and a costume ball. Ticketed speaker presentations are available through ufofest.com, while most other activities are free, and the schedule includes a “UAP pass pickup party,” a podcast recording, and a panel with an undisclosed whistleblower interviewed by Jeremy Corbell. The festival coincides with the release of previously unseen federal UFO files, adding new context to the town’s long‑standing UFO lore.
summaries.uap-whistleblower-david-grusch-on-non-hu: David Grusch served 14 years in the U.S. Air Force, reaching the rank of Major and completing a combat tour in Afghanistan. He later held senior intelligence positions at the National Geospatial‑Intelligence Agency and the National Reconnaissance Office, and represented the latter on the UAP Task Force from 2019 to 2021. In 2022, Grusch filed a whistleblower complaint that was described as credible and urgent. In 2023, he testified before Congress, claiming that parts of the U.S. government had blocked congressional oversight, withheld information from executive officials, and illegally concealed programs related to the recovery and reverse engineering of craft of unknown, non‑human origin.
summaries.ufo-files-reveal-the-same-old-material: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, but a preliminary review shows only blurry photographs, grainy videos, artist reconstructions, and anecdotal reports, with no new evidence of alien visitation. The files contain documents such as an artist’s composite sketch of an alleged ellipsoid bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian Foreign Ministry report claiming a Russian aircraft was a UFO, a 2023 Mexican Congress testimony on UAP that includes debunked fake alien corpses, and heavily redacted documents with a disclaimer protecting eyewitness identities and sensitive locations. Photographic stills from videos shot in the Southwestern United States show a small dot that could be a balloon, drone, or aircraft, while a 2024 report describes a football‑shaped UAP near Japan and an image of a Chinese UAV, but the author does not confirm these as extraterrestrial. Light anomalies captured by Apollo 17 astronauts are noted in the files, with the government stating no consensus on their nature and that further analysis will be released, and a video posted by Steven Greenstreet shows a parachute and flare. Pilot Scott Kelly and other experts are quoted explaining that optical illusion and misidentification can account for many reported sightings, and the author remains skeptical until new evidence emerges.

Die Veröffentlichung folgt einer Anweisung von Präsident Trump vom 19. Februar 2026, die Bundesbehörden anweist, Dokumente im Zusammenhang mit außerirdischem Leben und UAP zu identifizieren, zu überprüfen und freizugeben. Sie umfasst Dutzende von Behörden und Dutzende Millionen Aufzeichnungen, viele davon nur auf Papier.

en.title: Newly Released UAP Files Are Shattering Decades Of NASA’s UFO Narrative Just As Artemis Pushes Humanity Back Into Deep Space
en.summary: NASA has long stated that there is no confirmed evidence of alien spacecraft visiting Earth, a position it has maintained even as new UAP files are released. The Trump administration’s PURSUE program has begun declassifying military, intelligence, and defense archives that contain reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena, radar tracking incidents, astronaut observations, and classified investigations spanning decades. S.

de.title: Neu veröffentlichte UAP-Dateien zerstören jahrzehntelange UFO-Erzählungen der NASA, gerade als Artemis die Menschheit zurück in den Weltraum drängt
de.summary: Die NASA hat seit langem erklärt, dass es keine bestätigten Beweise dafür gibt, dass außerirdische Raumschiffe die Erde besucht haben, eine Position, die sie auch nach der Veröffentlichung neuer UAP-Dateien beibehalten hat. Das PURSUE-Programm der Trump-Regierung hat mit der Freigabe von Militär-, Geheimdienst- und Verteidigungsarchiven begonnen, die Berichte über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene, Radarverfolgungsvorfälle, Astronautenbeobachtungen und geheime Untersuchungen über Jahrzehnte enthalten. S.

en.title: Illusionist Uri Geller Reacts To US Congressman's Warning Over Next Set Of UFO Files: 'Holy Crap Is Coming'
en.summary: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reacted to US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf those already released, saying he believes every word of the warning. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first set of 162 documents was only a “drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming” with future releases.

de.title: Der Illusionist Uri Geller reagiert auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten vor der nächsten Reihe von UFO-Dateien: „Heiliger Mist kommt“
de.summary: Der israelisch-britische Illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reagierte auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten Tim Burchett, dass die nächste Ladung freigegebener UFO-Dateien die bereits freigegebenen in den Schatten stellen werde, und sagte, er glaube jedes Wort der Warnung. Burchett, ein Mitglied des UAP Caucus, sagte Joe Rogan, dass der erste Satz von 162 Dokumenten nur ein „Tropfen auf den heißen Stein“ sei und dass mit zukünftigen Veröffentlichungen „heiliger Mist kommt“.

en.title: A small Oregon town puts on a big UFO festival. Why it's worth a visit
en.summary: The 26th Annual McMenamins UFO Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, runs from May 14 to May 17, 2026, and is hosted by the McMenamins Hotel Oregon, making it the second largest UFO festival in the United States after Roswell. The festival celebrates the 1950 UFO sighting by Paul and Evelyn Trent, whose photographs of a metallic object sparked national debate and are considered among the most famous UFO images.

de.title: Eine kleine Stadt in Oregon veranstaltet ein großes UFO-Festival. Warum es einen Besuch wert ist
de.summary: Das 26. jährliche McMenamins UFO-Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, findet vom 14. bis 17. Mai 2026 statt und wird vom McMenamins Hotel Oregon ausgerichtet. Damit ist es nach Roswell das zweitgrößte UFO-Festival in den Vereinigten Staaten. Das Festival feiert die UFO-Sichtung von Paul und Evelyn Trent im Jahr 1950, deren Fotografien eines metallischen Objekts eine landesweite Debatte auslösten und zu den berühmtesten UFO-Bildern zählen.

de.title: UAP-Whistleblower David Grusch über „nichtmenschliche“ Biologika und Handwerk
de.summary: S. Air Force, erreicht den Rang eines Majors und absolviert einen Kampfeinsatz in Afghanistan. Später bekleidete er leitende Geheimdienstpositionen bei der National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency und dem National Reconnaissance Office und vertrat letzteres von 2019 bis 2021 in der UAP Task Force.

en.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
en.summary: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, but a preliminary review shows only blurry photographs, grainy videos, artist reconstructions, and anecdotal reports, with no new evidence of alien visitation. The files contain documents such as an artist’s composite sketch of an alleged ellipsoid bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian Foreign Ministry report claiming a Russian aircraft was a UFO, a 2023 Mexican Congress testimony on UAP that includes debunked fake alien corpses, and heavily redacted documents with a disclaimer protecting eyewitness identities and sensitive locations.

de.title: UFO-Dateien enthüllen … das gleiche alte Material
de.summary: Präsident Donald Trump und das Kriegsministerium haben die UFO-Akten veröffentlicht, aber eine vorläufige Überprüfung zeigt nur verschwommene Fotos, körnige Videos, Künstlerrekonstruktionen und anekdotische Berichte, ohne neue Beweise für den Besuch von Außerirdischen. Die Akten enthalten Dokumente wie eine von einem Künstler zusammengesetzte Skizze eines angeblich ellipsoiden bronzenen Metallobjekts, einen Bericht des georgischen Außenministeriums aus dem Jahr 2001, in dem behauptet wird, ein russisches Flugzeug sei ein UFO, eine Zeugenaussage des mexikanischen Kongresses zu UAP aus dem Jahr 2023, die entlarvte gefälschte Alienleichen enthält, sowie stark redigierte Dokumente mit einem Haftungsausschluss, der die Identität von Augenzeugen und sensible Orte schützt.
